context: Evaluates the agent's ability to maintain one-standard-per-turn discipline when the file contains many standards.

checklist.name: 4 standards correctly parsed
checklist.description: The agent identifies exactly 4 standards from the ### heading blocks

checklist.name: Separate turn for each standard
checklist.description: Each of the 4 standards gets its own question tool call — 4 distinct turns

checklist.name: No batching or grouping
checklist.description: The agent does not group standards into a single 'what do you think of all of these' question

checklist.name: Recap covers all 4
checklist.description: The recap table includes all 4 standards and their actions

checklist.name: Confirmation before report
checklist.description: The agent asks for confirmation before writing the report
